flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Miles Community College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Miles Community College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (383 → 332).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Miles Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).
